Motivation.quote: Where there is a will, there is a way.
Motivation.zh: 有志者，事竟成。
Motivation.author: Proverb

Motivation.quote: The journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
Motivation.zh: 千里之行，始於足下。
Motivation.author: Lao Tzu

Motivation.quote: Fortune favors the bold.
Motivation.zh: 天助勇者。
Motivation.author: Latin Proverb

Motivation.quote: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
Motivation.zh: 相信自己，成功已在一半。
Motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt

Motivation.quote: The best way out is always through.
Motivation.zh: 解決困境的最佳之道，是勇敢穿越。
Motivation.author: Robert Frost

Motivation.quote: Well begun is half done.
Motivation.zh: 良好的開端是成功的一半。
Motivation.author: Proverb

Motivation.quote: Every great achievement was once considered impossible.
Motivation.zh: 每一項偉大的成就，曾經都被視為不可能。
Motivation.author: Traditional Saying

Motivation.quote: A river cuts through rock not because of its power but its persistence.
Motivation.zh: 水滴石穿，非力之大，乃恆之久。
Motivation.author: Proverb

Motivation.quote: Little strokes fell great oaks.
Motivation.zh: 積少成多，可倒巨木。
Motivation.author: Benjamin Franklin

Motivation.quote: Energy and persistence conquer all things.
Motivation.zh: 精力與堅持，可征服萬物。
Motivation.author: Benjamin Franklin

Motivation.quote: It is never too late to be what you might have been.
Motivation.zh: 成為你本可成為的人，永遠不嫌遲。
Motivation.author: George Eliot

Motivation.quote: Great things are done by a series of small things brought together.
Motivation.zh: 偉大之事，由無數細小之事匯聚而成。
Motivation.author: Vincent van Gogh

Motivation.quote: The harder the conflict, the more glorious the triumph.
Motivation.zh: 衝突愈艱難，勝利愈輝煌。
Motivation.author: Thomas Paine

Motivation.quote: Strive not to be a success, but rather to be of value.
Motivation.zh: 不求成功，但求有價值。
Motivation.author: Albert Einstein

Motivation.quote: What we think, we become.
Motivation.zh: 心之所想，即身之所成。
Motivation.author: Buddha

Motivation.quote: Do not wait; the time will never be just right.
Motivation.zh: 莫等待；時機永遠不會完美。
Motivation.author: Napoleon Hill

Motivation.quote: You miss 100% of the shots you don't take.
Motivation.zh: 你不嘗試，就百分百失敗。
Motivation.author: Traditional Sports Saying

Motivation.quote: A ship in harbor is safe, but that is not what ships are built for.
Motivation.zh: 船在港灣固然安全，但那不是造船的目的。
Motivation.author: John A. Shedd

Motivation.quote: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow is our doubts of today.
Motivation.zh: 阻礙明日實現的，唯有今日之疑惑。
Motivation.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

Motivation.quote: Vision without action is merely a dream.
Motivation.zh: 沒有行動的願景，不過是夢想。
Motivation.author: Joel A. Barker

Motivation.quote: He who is not courageous enough to take risks will accomplish nothing in life.
Motivation.zh: 不夠勇敢去冒險的人，一生將一無所成。
Motivation.author: Muhammad Ali

Motivation.quote: Success is the sum of small efforts repeated day in and day out.
Motivation.zh: 成功是每日不斷重複的小努力之總和。
Motivation.author: Robert Collier

Motivation.quote: The future belongs to those who prepare for it today.
Motivation.zh: 未來屬於今日做好準備的人。
Motivation.author: Malcolm X

Motivation.quote: Difficulties strengthen the mind, as labor does the body.
Motivation.zh: 困難磨礪心志，正如勞動鍛煉身體。
Motivation.author: Seneca

Motivation.quote: Great works are performed not by strength but by perseverance.
Motivation.zh: 偉大的成就靠的不是力量，而是毅力。
Motivation.author: Samuel Johnson

Motivation.quote: 天行健，君子以自強不息。
Motivation.zh: 天行健，君子以自強不息。
Motivation.author: 《易經》

Motivation.quote: 不積跬步，無以至千里。
Motivation.zh: 不積跬步，無以至千里。
Motivation.author: 荀子

Motivation.quote: 志不強者智不達。
Motivation.zh: 志不強者智不達。
Motivation.author: 墨子

Motivation.quote: 精誠所至，金石為開。
Motivation.zh: 精誠所至，金石為開。
Motivation.author: 《後漢書》

Motivation.quote: 學如逆水行舟，不進則退。
Motivation.zh: 學如逆水行舟，不進則退。
Motivation.author: 傳統格言

Healing.quote: This too shall pass.
Healing.zh: 一切終將過去。
Healing.author: Traditional Proverb

Healing.quote: Time heals all wounds.
Healing.zh: 時間治癒一切創傷。
Healing.author: Proverb

Healing.quote: After the storm comes the calm.
Healing.zh: 風雨過後，見彩虹。
Healing.author: Proverb

Healing.quote: The wound is the place where the Light enters you.
Healing.zh: 傷口，是光照進你內心的地方。
Healing.author: Rumi

Healing.quote: Every day may not be good, but there is good in every day.
Healing.zh: 每一天未必都好，但每一天都有美好之處。
Healing.author: Traditional Saying

Healing.quote: Out of suffering have emerged the strongest souls.
Healing.zh: 最堅強的靈魂，往往從苦難中誕生。
Healing.author: Khalil Gibran

Healing.quote: Tomorrow is a new day.
Healing.zh: 明天又是新的一天。
Healing.author: Traditional Saying

Healing.quote: The soul that sees beauty may sometimes walk alone.
Healing.zh: 能看見美的靈魂，有時必須獨行。
Healing.author: Johann Wolfgang von Goethe

Healing.quote: Peace comes from within.
Healing.zh: 平靜源自內心。
Healing.author: Buddha

Healing.quote: A calm sea does not make a skilled sailor.
Healing.zh: 平靜的大海造就不了優秀的水手。
Healing.author: Proverb

Healing.quote: Even the darkest night will end and the sun will rise.
Healing.zh: 最黑暗的夜晚終將結束，太陽終將升起。
Healing.author: Victor Hugo

Healing.quote: Health is the greatest gift, contentment the greatest wealth.
Healing.zh: 健康是最大的禮物，知足是最大的財富。
Healing.author: Buddha

Healing.quote: The best remedy for those who are afraid, lonely, or unhappy is to go outside.
Healing.zh: 對於恐懼、孤獨或不快樂的人，最好的療方是走出戶外。
Healing.author: Anne Frank

Healing.quote: In the middle of winter, I found there was, within me, an invincible summer.
Healing.zh: 在嚴冬之中，我發現自己內心深處有一個不可征服的夏天。
Healing.author: Albert Camus

Healing.quote: Slow and steady wins the race.
Healing.zh: 穩扎穩打，方能致勝。
Healing.author: Aesop's Fables

Healing.quote: Grief is the price we pay for love.
Healing.zh: 悲傷，是我們為愛所付的代價。
Healing.author: Traditional Saying

Healing.quote: Rest when you're weary, refresh and renew yourself.
Healing.zh: 疲憊時，請休息；讓自己重新煥發。
Healing.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

Healing.quote: Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication.
Healing.zh: 簡單，是最極致的精緻。
Healing.author: Leonardo da Vinci

Healing.quote: Nature does not hurry, yet everything is accomplished.
Healing.zh: 自然從不急躁，卻萬事皆成。
Healing.author: Lao Tzu

Healing.quote: Where there is love there is life.
Healing.zh: 有愛之處，即有生命。
Healing.author: Mahatma Gandhi

Healing.quote: The wound heals, the mark remains.
Healing.zh: 傷口癒合，印記長存。
Healing.author: Old Proverb

Healing.quote: Calm mind brings inner strength and self-confidence.
Healing.zh: 平靜的心帶來內在力量與自信。
Healing.author: Dalai Lama

Healing.quote: You yourself, as much as anybody, deserve your love and affection.
Healing.zh: 你自己，和任何人一樣，值得你的愛與關懷。
Healing.author: Buddha

Healing.quote: The greatest healing therapy is friendship and love.
Healing.zh: 最偉大的療癒，是友誼與愛。
Healing.author: Hubert H. Humphrey

Healing.quote: Softly and gently, the heart mends with time.
Healing.zh: 輕柔地，靜靜地，心隨時間而癒合。
Healing.author: Traditional Saying

Healing.quote: 身安不如心安，屋寬不如心寬。
Healing.zh: 身安不如心安，屋寬不如心寬。
Healing.author: 傳統格言

Healing.quote: 人生如茶，苦盡甘來。
Healing.zh: 人生如茶，苦盡甘來。
Healing.author: 傳統格言

Healing.quote: 莫道桑榆晚，為霞尚滿天。
Healing.zh: 莫道桑榆晚，為霞尚滿天。
Healing.author: 劉禹錫

Healing.quote: 海納百川，有容乃大。
Healing.zh: 海納百川，有容乃大。
Healing.author: 林則徐

Healing.quote: 靜以修身，儉以養德。
Healing.zh: 靜以修身，儉以養德。
Healing.author: 諸葛亮

Hustle.quote: The early bird catches the worm.
Hustle.zh: 早起的鳥兒有蟲吃。
Hustle.author: Proverb

Hustle.quote: No pain, no gain.
Hustle.zh: 不勞無獲。
Hustle.author: Traditional Saying

Hustle.quote: Fortune favors the diligent.
Hustle.zh: 勤者，天助之。
Hustle.author: Proverb

Hustle.quote: God helps those who help themselves.
Hustle.zh: 天助自助者。
Hustle.author: Proverb

Hustle.quote: A smooth sea never made a skilled sailor.
Hustle.zh: 平靜的海造就不了技術高超的水手。
Hustle.author: Proverb

Hustle.quote: Sweat now, shine later.
Hustle.zh: 現在流汗，日後發光。
Hustle.author: Traditional Saying

Hustle.quote: Dream big, work hard, stay focused.
Hustle.zh: 夢想要大，努力要足，專注要深。
Hustle.author: Traditional Saying

Hustle.quote: Genius is one percent inspiration and ninety-nine percent perspiration.
Hustle.zh: 天才是百分之一的靈感加百分之九十九的汗水。
Hustle.author: Thomas Edison

Hustle.quote: There are no shortcuts to any place worth going.
Hustle.zh: 任何值得去的地方，都沒有捷徑。
Hustle.author: Beverly Sills

Hustle.quote: Action is the foundational key to all success.
Hustle.zh: 行動是一切成功的基石。
Hustle.author: Pablo Picasso

Hustle.quote: Opportunities don't happen, you create them.
Hustle.zh: 機會不會自己出現，你要自己創造。
Hustle.author: Chris Grosser

Hustle.quote: The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.
Hustle.zh: 開始的方法，就是停止空談，立刻行動。
Hustle.author: Walt Disney

Hustle.quote: Hard work beats talent when talent doesn't work hard.
Hustle.zh: 勤奮勝過天賦，當天賦不夠勤奮的時候。
Hustle.author: Tim Notke

Hustle.quote: Rise and grind.
Hustle.zh: 起身，拼搏。
Hustle.author: Traditional Saying

Hustle.quote: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
Hustle.zh: 成功往往降臨於忙到無暇尋找它的人。
Hustle.author: Henry David Thoreau

Hustle.quote: The man who moves a mountain begins by carrying away small stones.
Hustle.zh: 移山之人，從搬走小石子開始。
Hustle.author: Confucius

Hustle.quote: Well done is better than well said.
Hustle.zh: 說得好不如做得好。
Hustle.author: Benjamin Franklin

Hustle.quote: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
Hustle.zh: 別盯著時鐘；學它的樣子，不停前進。
Hustle.author: Sam Levenson

Hustle.quote: It is not the mountain we conquer, but ourselves.
Hustle.zh: 我們征服的不是山，而是自己。
Hustle.author: Sir Edmund Hillary

Hustle.quote: The only place where success comes before work is in the dictionary.
Hustle.zh: 唯一成功在工作之前出現的地方，是字典。
Hustle.author: Vidal Sassoon

Hustle.quote: Diligence is the mother of good fortune.
Hustle.zh: 勤勞是好運之母。
Hustle.author: Miguel de Cervantes

Hustle.quote: Work hard in silence, let success make the noise.
Hustle.zh: 默默努力，讓成功替你發聲。
Hustle.author: Traditional Saying

Hustle.quote: The expert in anything was once a beginner.
Hustle.zh: 任何領域的高手，都曾是初學者。
Hustle.author: Helen Hayes

Hustle.quote: Perseverance is not a long race; it is many short races one after the other.
Hustle.zh: 毅力不是一場長跑，而是一場接一場的短跑。
Hustle.author: Walter Elliot

Hustle.quote: A goal without a plan is just a wish.
Hustle.zh: 沒有計劃的目標，只是願望。
Hustle.author: Antoine de Saint-Exupery

Hustle.quote: 業精於勤，荒於嬉；行成於思，毀於隨。
Hustle.zh: 業精於勤，荒於嬉；行成於思，毀於隨。
Hustle.author: 韓愈

Hustle.quote: 鍥而不捨，金石可鏤。
Hustle.zh: 鍥而不捨，金石可鏤。
Hustle.author: 荀子

Hustle.quote: 書山有路勤為徑，學海無涯苦作舟。
Hustle.zh: 書山有路勤為徑，學海無涯苦作舟。
Hustle.author: 韓愈

Hustle.quote: 寶劍鋒從磨礪出，梅花香自苦寒來。
Hustle.zh: 寶劍鋒從磨礪出，梅花香自苦寒來。
Hustle.author: 傳統格言

Hustle.quote: 勤能補拙是良訓，一分辛苦一分才。
Hustle.zh: 勤能補拙是良訓，一分辛苦一分才。
Hustle.author: 傳統格言

Calm.quote: This too shall pass.
Calm.zh: 一切終將過去。
Calm.author: Traditional Proverb

Calm.quote: Still waters run deep.
Calm.zh: 靜水流深。
Calm.author: Proverb

Calm.quote: Peace begins with a smile.
Calm.zh: 平和，從一個微笑開始。
Calm.author: Mother Teresa

Calm.quote: Silence is a source of great strength.
Calm.zh: 沉默是力量的源泉。
Calm.author: Lao Tzu

Calm.quote: The quieter you become, the more you can hear.
Calm.zh: 你愈安靜，你能聽到的就愈多。
Calm.author: Ram Dass

Calm.quote: Within you, there is a stillness and a sanctuary.
Calm.zh: 你的內心，有一份寧靜，有一處聖所。
Calm.author: Hermann Hesse

Calm.quote: Calmness is the cradle of power.
Calm.zh: 平靜是力量的搖籃。
Calm.author: Josiah Gilbert Holland

Calm.quote: Breathe. Let go. And remind yourself that this very moment is the only one you know you have for sure.
Calm.zh: 呼吸。放手。提醒自己，此刻是你唯一確定擁有的時刻。
Calm.author: Oprah Winfrey

Calm.quote: In the midst of movement and chaos, keep stillness inside of you.
Calm.zh: 在動盪與混亂之中，保持內心的靜定。
Calm.author: Deepak Chopra

Calm.quote: Nature always wears the colors of the spirit.
Calm.zh: 自然，永遠披著靈魂的顏色。
Calm.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

Calm.quote: Quiet the mind, and the soul will speak.
Calm.zh: 讓心靜下來，靈魂自會開口。
Calm.author: Ma Jaya Sati Bhagavati

Calm.quote: Wherever you are, be all there.
Calm.zh: 無論身在何處，請全然在場。
Calm.author: Jim Elliot

Calm.quote: The mind is like water; when it's turbulent, it's difficult to see. When it's calm, everything becomes clear.
Calm.zh: 心如水：動盪時難以看清；平靜時，一切清晰可見。
Calm.author: Prasad Mahes

Calm.quote: Let nature be your teacher.
Calm.zh: 讓自然成為你的老師。
Calm.author: William Wordsworth

Calm.quote: Serenity is not freedom from the storm, but peace amid the storm.
Calm.zh: 平靜不是免於風暴，而是在風暴中的安寧。
Calm.author: Traditional Saying

Calm.quote: One kind word can change someone's entire day.
Calm.zh: 一句善言，可以改變某人的整個一天。
Calm.author: Traditional Saying

Calm.quote: A quiet mind is able to hear intuition over fear.
Calm.zh: 平靜的心，能在恐懼之上聽見直覺。
Calm.author: Traditional Saying

Calm.quote: Simplify, then add lightness.
Calm.zh: 化繁為簡，然後添一份輕盈。
Calm.author: Colin Chapman

Calm.quote: Slow down and everything you are chasing will come around and catch you.
Calm.zh: 慢下來，你所追求的一切都會轉身找到你。
Calm.author: John De Paola

Calm.quote: The soul always knows what to do to heal itself. The challenge is to silence the mind.
Calm.zh: 靈魂總知道如何自我療癒，挑戰在於讓心靜下來。
Calm.author: Caroline Myss

Calm.quote: Almost everything will work again if you unplug it for a few minutes, including you.
Calm.zh: 幾乎所有東西，拔掉插頭幾分鐘後都能重新運作，包括你。
Calm.author: Anne Lamott

Calm.quote: Gratitude turns what we have into enough.
Calm.zh: 感恩，讓我們所擁有的，變得足夠。
Calm.author: Traditional Saying

Calm.quote: The present moment is the only moment available to us.
Calm.zh: 當下，是我們唯一擁有的時刻。
Calm.author: Thich Nhat Hanh

Calm.quote: Sit in reflection when possible; let your soul catch up with your body.
Calm.zh: 有機會便靜坐沉思，讓靈魂追上你的身體。
Calm.author: Traditional Saying

Calm.quote: Home is where the heart finds its peace.
Calm.zh: 家，是心找到平靜的地方。
Calm.author: Traditional Saying

Calm.quote: 上善若水，水善利萬物而不爭。
Calm.zh: 上善若水，水善利萬物而不爭。
Calm.author: 老子

Calm.quote: 知足者常樂。
Calm.zh: 知足者常樂。
Calm.author: 老子

Calm.quote: 寵辱不驚，閒看庭前花開花落。
Calm.zh: 寵辱不驚，閒看庭前花開花落。
Calm.author: 洪應明

Calm.quote: 心靜自然涼。
Calm.zh: 心靜自然涼。
Calm.author: 傳統格言

Calm.quote: 淡泊以明志，寧靜以致遠。
Calm.zh: 淡泊以明志，寧靜以致遠。
Calm.author: 諸葛亮
